characters.description: First-person military arms and hands, US Marine combat gloves, rolled sleeves, desert MARPAT camouflage, muscular forearms, realistic proportions
Chinese PLA soldier, Type 07 digital camouflage uniform, QBZ-95 rifle, combat helmet, body armor, full body standing pose
Chinese PLA machine gunner, heavy weapons vest, ammo belt, light machine gun, combat helmet with visor
Chinese PLA officer, distinctive rank insignia, radio headset, pistol holster, command bearing
US Marine team leader, MARPAT desert camo, AN/PRC-152 radio, M4A1 carbine, patrol cap, leadership presence
US Marine rifleman, MARPAT desert camo, M27 IAR, standard MOLLE vest, combat helmet with NVG mount
US Marine SAW gunner, heavy loadout, M249 SAW, extra ammo pouches, reinforced vest
US Marine grenadier, M320 grenade launcher attached to M4, 40mm grenade pouches on vest
US Marine designated marksman, M110 SASS with scope, ghillie wrap on rifle, boonie hat, low profile

weapons.description: M4A1 carbine, 5.56mm, Picatinny rail, collapsible stock, 14.5 inch barrel, black anodized
M27 Infantry Automatic Rifle, 5.56mm, free-float handguard, bipod folded, ACOG sight mount
M249 Squad Automatic Weapon, belt-fed 5.56mm, bipod extended, heat shield, ammo box
M110 Semi-Automatic Sniper System, 7.62mm, suppressor, Leupold scope, adjustable stock
SIG Sauer M17 pistol, 9mm, tan FDE finish, Picatinny rail, 17 round magazine
M320 grenade launcher standalone, 40mm, flip-up sight, pistol grip, olive drab
Mossberg 590 pump-action shotgun, 12 gauge, ghost ring sights, black synthetic stock
QBZ-95 Chinese bullpup assault rifle, 5.56mm, integrated carry handle, olive drab polymer
Accuracy International AXMC sniper rifle, .338 Lapua Magnum, folding stock, long range scope, bipod, tan finish
M2 Browning heavy machine gun, .50 BMG, tripod mounted, belt-fed, black steel
AK-47 style assault rifle, 7.62x39mm, wooden furniture, stamped receiver, classic silhouette

drones.description: Military ISR quadcopter drone, matte gray, camera gimbal mount, antenna array, compact tactical design
FPV strike drone, small racing drone form factor, explosive payload attached underneath, carbon fiber frame
Counter-drone electronic warfare antenna, directional jammer, military tripod mount, olive drab
